title: Birthday Wishes 生日祝福
scene: 朋友们给Lily庆祝生日，送上祝福。

lines.en: Happy birthday, Lily! Here is a present for you.
lines.zh: 生日快乐，莉莉！这是给你的礼物。

lines.en: Thank you, Tom! Can I open it now?
lines.zh: 谢谢你，汤姆！我现在可以打开吗？

lines.en: Of course! I hope you like it.
Wow, a storybook! I love reading! Thank you so much!
lines.zh: 哇，一本故事书！我喜欢阅读！太感谢了！

lines.en: Happy birthday, Lily! I made a card for you.
lines.zh: 生日快乐，莉莉！我给你做了一张卡片。

lines.en: It's beautiful! I love the drawings on it.
lines.zh: 真漂亮！我喜欢上面的画。

lines.en: I drew your favorite animals on it.
lines.zh: 我画了你最喜欢的动物。

lines.en: Let's sing the birthday song now!
Make a wish, Lily! Blow out the candles!
This is the best birthday ever! Let's eat the cake!
lines.zh: 这是最棒的生日！我们吃蛋糕吧！
